subcodes.first_line: Thy mention hath been made before the Wronged One in His Most Great Prison, and He hath answered thee with that wherefrom the musk of inner meanings hath been diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم فی سجنه الاعظم و اجابک بما تضوع منه مسک المعانی بین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
